wiki.summary: “cross em out” brings back Nettspend’s distorted sound, following a run of melodic tracks. He raps about topics such as his hometown, Richmond, Virginia, drugs, cars, women, and guns. The track’s distorted instrumental, which was produced by azure, consists of high-pitched synths, while hard-hitting bass and fast-paced drums distort everything in its way. The track would release as the sixteenth track to Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis, on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
